lines.speaker: Jimmy
lines.text: 'Ello there.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Tell me about this room?

lines.speaker: Jimmy
lines.text: Well... s'like thish...

lines.speaker: Jimmy
lines.text: Thish here'sh a shtore room right?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: A store room you mean?

lines.speaker: Jimmy
lines.text: That'sh what I shaid! *HIC* A shtore room.... Now technic'ly shpeaking, I should be outshide guarding it...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: But you just nipped in to have a quick drink?

lines.speaker: Jimmy
lines.text: Yep... and to practish.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Practish? I mean.. practise what?

lines.speaker: Jimmy
lines.text: Keg balancin. I'm the besht.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Tell me how to balance kegs?

lines.speaker: Jimmy
lines.text: Yer very very shtrange. But.... you pick the keg up, and balance it on yer head, then you pick another keg up and put that on top. S'really very eashy.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Eashy?

lines.speaker: Jimmy
lines.text: Yesh. Eashy.

lines.speaker: Jimmy
lines.text: But you couldn't ever balansh ash many ash meee!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That sounds like a challenge, I'll show you!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: May I claim my tokens please?

lines.speaker: Jimmy
lines.text: Wha'? You ain't earnt any mate!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: May I claim my tokens please?

lines.speaker: Jimmy
lines.text: Well... err.. ish not offishal or anyfin... but I got the ledger of tokensh 'ere. I'll jus' err.. write it in!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Won't they know?

lines.speaker: Jimmy
lines.text: Nah... hic.... I'm a wizsh at copyin' signaturesh! Jus' ashk an offishal mem'er of shtaff like Shloane fer yer tokensh.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Bye!

lines.speaker: Jimmy
lines.text: Shure you wouldn't like an ickle drinkie fore yer go?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No thanks, got things to do, people to see, tokens to earn...

sections.title: Overhead dialogue when the player is balancing kegs

lines.speaker: Jimmy
lines.text: Ya got no chance o' beatin' me [player name]!

lines.speaker: Jimmy
lines.text: No one's stronger than me, 'speshly not [player name]!

sections.title: When the kegs fall after balancing 5 or more

lines.speaker: Jimmy
lines.text: Wow! That'sh bery impr....imp...impresh.... good [player name]! Equalsh my record!
